research_question: Does the TD(0)-trained value network's internal 64-dim representation implicitly encode reward-metric structure, and how does it compare to explicit contrastive encoders?
key_finding: TD(0) value training implicitly creates reward-metric structure in the hidden layer (rho=0.287) without any explicit contrastive objective, exceeding the contrastive_repr_v1 baseline (0.163). Value function accuracy (scalar rho=0.626) far exceeds the hidden-layer metric structure, confirming the two are distinct properties.
